news.headline: 'They destroyed the future': Palestinian anger at rise in Israeli demolitions in East Jerusalem
news.summary: Palestinian homes are being pulled down in occupied East Jerusalem to make way for a park.

news.headline: 2 policemen martyred in separate 'targeted attacks' in Bannu
news.summary:
<p>BANNU: Two police constables lost their lives in separate incidents of targeted killings in Bannu district, officials said on Friday.</p>
<p>Police authorities termed both incidents acts of terrorism and have launched search operations to trace and arrest the perpetrators.</p

news.headline: South Korea sentences ex-president Yoon to 30 years over North Korea drone incident
news.summary: South Korea on Friday sentenced ex-president Yoon Suk Yeol to 30 years in prison for sending military drones into North Korea in 2024 in a bid to "heighten inter-Korean military tensions and manufacture a national crisis" enabling him to declare martial law. news.headline: South Korea defeat Czech Republic to make strong World Cup start
news.summary: South Korea won their first World Cup match on Thursday beating the Czech Republic 2-1, thanks to a decisive late goal from substitute Oh Hyeon-gyu.

news.headline: CM Murad approaches PM Shehbaz for restoration of curtailed water supplies
news.summary:
<p>HYDERABAD: Sindh Chief Minister Syed Murad Ali Shah has urged Prime Minister Mian Mohammad Shehbaz Sharif to halt the filling of dams until the monsoon season to prevent a severe crisis in the province.</p>

news.headline: ‘Operation Pushkin’: Paris Trial Puts Spotlight on Rare-Book Heists
news.summary: One by one, valuable works by Russian masters like Pushkin and Gogol were disappearing from libraries across Europe. Now six defendants are being prosecuted.
